summary: Wrote 139 unit tests across 12 test classes covering all public classes and methods in suite-evidence-risk/risk/sbom/generator.py. All 139 tests pass in 1.16s. Source file achieves 98.92% line coverage.
issues: The SBOMQualityScorer uses 'version' key for both CycloneDX and SPDX components, but SPDX packages use 'versionInfo'. This means perfect SPDX SBOMs always score 70 (grade C). This is a behaviour quirk in the source — the test documents it accurately rather than working around it.
